privileged_info_summary: The close_quality_alert@1 task operates on a synthetic Odoo 17 quality management environment. The target alert 'Paint Discoloration on Metal Panels' is created programmatically in the New stage with product 'Cabinet with Doors' and a description referencing Batch BATCH-2024-003 with 12 affected units. The environment is accessed at http://localhost:8069 with admin credentials (admin/admin). The task is correctly classified as easy difficulty with a 240-second timeout and 30-step limit. The verifier uses external VLM evaluation rather than automatic verification. All 18 quality alerts, 5 control points, and 6 quality checks are synthetic data created during environment initialization.
